MonsterSurvivors.title: Monster Survivors
MonsterSurvivors.summary: Dive into a fast-paced survival arena and hold the line against relentless waves of monsters.

playSection.title: Play instantly
playSection.description: The complete experience loads directly in your browser. Hit fullscreen for total immersion.
playSection.hint: If the game does not load, disable aggressive ad blockers or refresh the page.

details.title: Game details
details.description: Core facts to get you started quickly.

tips.title: Quick tips
tips.description: A few hints before you jump into the arena.
items: Collect glowing shards early to snowball upgrades.
Keep moving to kite enemy clusters and avoid damage spikes.
Trigger dash or shield abilities before you are cornered.
Experiment with daily modifiers to climb the leaderboard.

Solitaire.title: Solitaire
Solitaire.summary: The world's most popular single-player card game! Arrange all cards by suit and sequence to the foundation. Challenge your strategic thinking.

playSection.title: Play instantly
playSection.description: The complete game loads directly in your browser. Enjoy solitaire anytime, anywhere.
playSection.hint: If the game does not load, disable ad blockers or refresh the page.

details.title: Game details
details.description: Key information before you start playing.

tips.title: Gameplay tips
tips.description: Master these tips to improve your win rate.
items: Prioritize uncovering cards from the stock pile to increase options.
Keep columns empty when possible for temporary card storage.
Move smaller cards first to avoid blocking larger cards.
Use the undo feature to try different strategies and find optimal solutions.
